game_meta.name: Marvel Rivals
game_meta.tagline: 6v6 hero-based shooter — Marvel heroes with unique kits, role queue (Vanguard / Duelist / Strategist).
game_meta.round_economy: No economy — abilities recharge on cooldown. Ult charges from damage / healing dealt.
game_meta.round_format: Best of 3 maps. Convoy = attack/defense rounds. Domination = control point cap. Convergence = hybrid cap + payload.
key_mechanics: Role lock: 2 Vanguards (tanks) + 2 Duelists (DPS) + 2 Strategists (supports) per team
Team-Up abilities: certain hero combos unlock special synergy abilities (Hulk + Iron Man = Gamma Ray, etc.)
Ultimate abilities — track enemy ults, manage your own with damage/healing dealt
Destructible environment — walls / floors can be destroyed for new sightlines
Cooldown management: most tactical abilities have 6-15s cooldowns
Air-control system — many heroes can fly / glide / hover (Storm, Iron Man, Thor)
Match types: Convoy (escort payload), Domination (control point), Convergence (hybrid)
team_ups: Hulk + Iron Man = Gamma Ray (massive damage beam)
Hela + Loki + Thor = Asgardian Soul (team buff)
Magneto + Scarlet Witch = Metallic Curse (debuff enemies)
Luna Snow + Iron Fist + Namor = Frozen Spirit (heal + buff)

sites.name: Payload — First Stretch
sites.attack_strategy: Brawl through choke, Vanguard takes shield duty, Strategists pocket DPS, Duelists clean up
sites.defense_strategy: Anchor choke with Vanguard, Doctor Strange portal for rotation, Hela / Hawkeye pick from rooftop

sites.name: Payload — Second Stretch
sites.attack_strategy: Side flank with mobility heroes (Spider-Man, Magik), Vanguard pushes payload front
sites.defense_strategy: Sigma-like Vanguard (Magneto) hold bridge, Strategists peel for tank

sites.name: Payload — Final
sites.attack_strategy: Full team ult chain on payload final — Iron Man Gamma Overdrive + Hela Goddess of Death
sites.defense_strategy: Ult save for cap contest, Adam Warlock Karmic Revival for retake

sites.name: Capture Point (Garden)
sites.attack_strategy: Cap point — full team commit, Strategists area heal, Duelists clean back-line
sites.defense_strategy: Anchor with Vanguard, Strategists pocket Vanguard, Duelists peel for Strategist

Captain America.kit: Living Legend Shield (front block), Sentinel Strike (charge), Freedom Charge (ult — speed + heal aura)
Captain America.ideal_use: Brawl tank with shield front, Charge for engages, Freedom Charge ult on cap

Doctor Strange.kit: Shield of Seraphim (barrier), Pentagram of Farallah (vertical teleport), Eye of Agamotto (ult — large area stun)
Doctor Strange.ideal_use: Brawl tank, Pentagram for rotation, Eye for cap commit + ult chain

Groot.kit: Ironwood Wall (placeable wall), Vengeful Stamen (area damage), Strangling Prison (ult — trap enemies)
Groot.ideal_use: Walls for choke / cap split, Stamen for area denial, Prison ult for cap commit

Hulk.kit: Indestructible Guard (shield), Incredible Leap (jump), Hulk Smash (ult — large AoE jump)
Hulk.ideal_use: Dive back-line with Leap, Shield for sustain, Smash for cap commit (combo with Iron Man = Gamma Ray)

Magneto.kit: Metal Bulwark (large shield), Iron Volley (projectile damage), Meteor M (ult — metal pulse)
Magneto.ideal_use: Poke tank with Bulwark, Volley for chip damage, Meteor for cap commit

Peni Parker.kit: Cyber-Web Cluster (web traps), Bionic Spider-Nest (heal nest), Ultimate Bionic Hyperthrust (ult — area damage)
Peni Parker.ideal_use: Webs for entry deny, Nest for team sustain, Hyperthrust for cap commit

Thor.kit: Awakening Rune (flight), Storm Surge (damage), God of Thunder (ult — large AoE)
Thor.ideal_use: Sky control with Rune, Storm Surge for chip, God of Thunder for cap commit (combo with Storm = Lightning Storm)

Venom.kit: Cellular Corrosion (damage zone), Frenzied Arrival (dash), Feast of the Abyss (ult — area heal/damage)
Venom.ideal_use: Brawl with Corrosion, Frenzied for engage, Feast for cap commit + team heal

Emma Frost.kit: Diamond Form (HP buff), Mind Control (debuff), Psionic Seduction (ult — area control)
Emma Frost.ideal_use: Diamond for sustain, Mind Control for cap denial, Psionic for ult chain

The Thing.kit: Stone Smash (damage), Embattled Leap (jump), Clobbering Time (ult — area AoE)
The Thing.ideal_use: Brawl tank, Leap for engage, Clobbering Time for cap commit

Black Panther.kit: Spinning Kick (mobility), Spirit Rend (damage), Bast's Descent (ult — vertical strike)
Black Panther.ideal_use: Flank back-line, Spinning Kick for engages, Bast's Descent on cap

Black Widow.kit: Edge Dancer (mobility), Electro-Plasma Explosion (damage), Fearsome Sting (ult — single-target)
Black Widow.ideal_use: Long-range sniper, Edge Dancer for reposition, Fearsome Sting for DPS kill

Hawkeye.kit: Crescent Dive (mobility), Skyward Leap (vertical), Hunter's Sight (ult — wallhack)
Hawkeye.ideal_use: Long-range bow, Dive for reposition, Hunter's Sight on team commit

Hela.kit: Soul Drainer (heal on kill), Hel's Descent (vertical), Goddess of Death (ult — area damage)
Hela.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Soul Drainer sustains, Goddess of Death for cap commit (combo with Loki/Thor = Asgardian Soul)

Iron Fist.kit: Wall of Wind (block), Dragon's Defense (heal), Living Chi (ult — speed + damage)
Iron Fist.ideal_use: Melee DPS, Dragon's Defense for sustain, Living Chi for cap commit

Iron Man.kit: Hyper-Density Armor (sustain), Micro-Missile Barrage (damage), Gamma Overdrive (ult — large AoE)
Iron Man.ideal_use: Air DPS, Density Armor for sustain, Gamma Overdrive for cap commit (combo with Hulk = Gamma Ray)

Magik.kit: Dark Teleportation (mobility), Stepping Discs (mobility), Darkchild (ult — area damage + buff)
Magik.ideal_use: Flank DPS with Teleport, Discs for vertical, Darkchild for cap commit

Moon Knight.kit: Hand of Khonshu (damage), Moon Blade (ranged), Hand of Khonshu Ult (ult — area damage)
Moon Knight.ideal_use: Ranged DPS, Hand of Khonshu for chip, Ult for cap commit

Namor.kit: Aquatic Dominion (sustain), Wrath of the Seven Seas (damage), Horn of Proteus (ult — area attack)
Namor.ideal_use: Ranged DPS, Aquatic Dominion for sustain, Horn for cap commit

Psylocke.kit: Wing Shuriken (ranged), Psi-Blade Dash (mobility), Dance of the Butterfly (ult — single-target)
Psylocke.ideal_use: Flank DPS, Dash for engages, Dance for DPS kill

The Punisher.kit: Smart Web (slow), Adjudication (ranged), Final Judgment (ult — area damage)
The Punisher.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Web for control, Final Judgment for cap commit (combo with Rocket = Ammo Invention)

Scarlet Witch.kit: Mystic Projection (mobility), Telekinesis (control), Reality Erasure (ult — area damage)
Scarlet Witch.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Telekinesis for control, Reality Erasure for cap commit (combo with Magneto = Metallic Curse)

Spider-Man.kit: Web-Cluster (web trap), Get Over Here! (web pull), Spectacular Spin (ult — area damage)
Spider-Man.ideal_use: Flank DPS, Web Pull for engages, Spin for cap commit

Squirrel Girl.kit: Mammal Bond (heal squirrels), Squirrel Tsunami (ranged), Unbeatable Squirrel Tsunami (ult — area)
Squirrel Girl.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Tsunami for chip, Unbeatable for cap commit

Star-Lord.kit: Stellar Shift (mobility), Blaster Barrage (damage), Galactic Legend (ult — speed + damage)
Star-Lord.ideal_use: Mobile DPS, Stellar Shift for engages, Galactic for cap commit

Storm.kit: Wind Blade (mobility), Goddess Boost (damage), Omega Hurricane (ult — area damage)
Storm.ideal_use: Air DPS, Wind Blade for engages, Omega Hurricane for cap commit (combo with Thor = Lightning Storm)

Winter Soldier.kit: Trooper Bot (auto-fire), Tainted Voltage (damage), Kraken Impact (ult — area damage)
Winter Soldier.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Bot for area coverage, Kraken for cap commit

Wolverine.kit: Berserker Leap (mobility), Vicious Rampage (damage), Last Stand (ult — temp invuln)
Wolverine.ideal_use: Brawl DPS, Leap for engages, Last Stand for cap commit

Human Torch.kit: Plasma Body (sustain), Scorching Trail (damage), Supernova (ult — area damage)
Human Torch.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Plasma Body for sustain, Supernova for cap commit

Mister Fantastic.kit: Reflexive Rubber (reflect), Stretch Punch (damage), Brainiac Bounce (ult — area)
Mister Fantastic.ideal_use: Damage DPS, Reflexive Rubber for sustain, Brainiac Bounce for cap commit

Adam Warlock.kit: Avatar Life Stream (heal), Cosmic Cluster (damage), Karmic Revival (ult — area resurrect)
Adam Warlock.ideal_use: Heal DPS, Cosmic Cluster for chip, Karmic Revival on team wipe

Cloak & Dagger.kit: Veil of Lightforce (heal), Dagger Storm (damage), Eternal Bond (ult — area heal + damage)
Cloak & Dagger.ideal_use: Heal cycle, Dagger Storm for chip, Eternal Bond for cap commit

Invisible Woman.kit: Force Field (barrier), Psionic Vortex (control), Invisible Boundary (ult — area)
Invisible Woman.ideal_use: Field for site hold, Vortex for control, Boundary for cap commit

Jeff the Land Shark.kit: Joyful Splash (heal), Hide and Seek (escape), It's Jeff! (ult — area)
Jeff the Land Shark.ideal_use: Heal DPS, Splash for sustain, It's Jeff! for cap commit

Loki.kit: Regeneration Domain (heal), Devious Exchange (swap), God of Mischief (ult — clone)
Loki.ideal_use: Heal cycle, Swap for save, God of Mischief for cap commit (combo with Hela/Thor = Asgardian Soul)

Luna Snow.kit: Cryo Heart (heal), Absolute Zero (damage/slow), Fate of Both Worlds (ult — area)
Luna Snow.ideal_use: Heal cycle, Absolute Zero for control, Fate for cap commit (combo with Iron Fist/Namor = Frozen Spirit)

Mantis.kit: Nature's Soothing (heal), Spore Slumber (sleep), Soul Resurgence (ult — area heal)
Mantis.ideal_use: Heal DPS, Slumber on engaging tank, Soul Resurgence for cap commit

Rocket Raccoon.kit: Repair Mode (heal), Jetpack Dash (mobility), C.Y.A. (ult — area damage)
Rocket Raccoon.ideal_use: Heal DPS, Jetpack for repositioning, C.Y.A. for cap commit (combo with Punisher = Ammo Invention)

Ultron.kit: Imperative Fix (heal), Encephalo-Ray (damage), Rage of Ultron (ult — area damage)
Ultron.ideal_use: Heal DPS, Encephalo-Ray for chip, Rage of Ultron for cap commit

bronze: Hero pick not adjusted (one-trick into counters)
Cooldowns wasted on entry without team
No team coordination on ult chains
gold: Ult economy: 5 ults charged, no coordination
Counter-pick depth — knowing 2-3 counters per hero
Comms on save round not helping team
platinum: Eco round commits — wrong hero swap
Buy / swap decision based on rounds, not ult diff
diamond: Ult chain timing — 1 ult wasted per round
Off-angle pre-aim not adjusted per round
Hero swap timing — too early or too late
Vanguard ult vs Duelist ult priority
gm_celestial: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp — but predictable on own
Ult tracking gaps — 1 ult untracked per round

positioning: Are Strategists positioned behind tank for line-of-sight heal?
Are Duelists at correct range for their hero?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines?
Did the player commit to the team push or solo flank?
Is the player using cover (destructible terrain) appropriately?
crosshair: Is the crosshair pre-aimed at head level?
Is the player tracking hitscan or leading projectile?
Is the crosshair on the tank (priority target) or DPS?
Is the player landing key abilities (Stamen, Sting, Sleep)?
Is the player using ADS for ranged or hipfire close?
utility: Did the Vanguard use shield + ability for engages?
Did the Duelist use ability rotation proactively?
Did the Strategist use heal + utility coordination?
Was the ult used at the right moment (chain or solo)?
Was the Team-Up activated for max effect?
decisions: Did the player swap to a counter when called?
Did the player commit to cap or hesitate?
Did the player rotate when called?
Did the player trade teammate's death within 3s?
Did the player engage 1v3+ without backup?
Did the player track ult diff before engaging?
Did the player commit to the ult chain?
Did the player coordinate Team-Up combo?

vocabulary: Ult / Ultimate: Hero's signature ability, charged from damage/healing.
Ult charge / Ult tracking: Track enemy ult percentages each round.
Ult chain: Sequential ult use for compounding damage.
Team-Up: Special combo ability between specific hero pairs.
Vanguard: Tank role (2 per team) — front-line shield/sustain.
Duelist: DPS role (2 per team) — damage dealers.
Strategist: Support role (2 per team) — heal + utility.
Convoy: Payload escort game mode.
Domination: Control point game mode.
Convergence: Hybrid cap + payload game mode.
Cap / Capture: Capping objective point.
Payload: Vehicle that moves when attackers near it.
Cooldown / CD: Time before ability can be reused.
Pocket: Healing/boosting a single DPS (Adam Warlock + Iron Man).
Peel: Defending teammate from flank (Strategist for Vanguard).
Dive comp: Mobile heroes (Spider-Man, Magik, Black Panther) for back-line.
Brawl comp: Sustained heroes (Hulk, Thor, Cap) for fights.
Poke comp: Long-range heroes (Hawkeye, Hela, Magneto) for chip.
Bunker comp: Stationary heroes (Magneto, Peni) for site holds.
Anti-dive: Strategist + Vanguard combo to counter dive.
Counter-pick: Swapping heroes to counter enemy comp.
Hard counter: Hero built to shut down another.
Soft counter: Hero with disadvantage but not insurmountable.
One-trick: Player who only plays one hero.
Headshot multiplier: 2x damage on most heroes.
Tempo: Speed of team commitment vs setup.
Tank-Up: Bringing more than 2 tanks.
Brawl tank: Hulk, Cap, Thor, Venom.
Off-tank: Doctor Strange, Magneto.
Main tank: Hulk, Cap, Thor (heavy front-line).
Off-strat: Loki, Jeff (specialized strategist).
Main strat: Adam Warlock, Luna, Mantis (main healer).
Off-DPS: Hawkeye, Hela (utility damage).
Main DPS: Iron Man, Storm, Punisher (sustained damage).
Anti-tank: Punisher, Iron Man (anti-Vanguard).
Anti-Strategist: Spider-Man, Black Panther (back-line dive).
Anti-flanker: Strategist + Vanguard peel.
